records.question: Which addresses in Maine have the details exactly 6187 Feil Extension Apt. 749, were classified as House from 2010-12-29 11:01:39 to 2018-03-22 02:54:10, and belong to customers with email tkassulke@example.com who became customers on or after 2012-01-11 21:17:01?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT addresses.address_id FROM addresses
JOIN customer_addresses ON addresses.address_id = customer_addresses.address_id
JOIN customers ON customer_addresses.customer_id = customers.customer_id
WHERE addresses.state_province_county = 'Maine' AND customer_addresses.address_type = 'House' AND customer_addresses.date_to = '2018-03-22 02:54:10' AND customer_addresses.date_from = '2010-12-29 11:01:39' AND customers.date_became_customer >= '2012-01-11 21:17:01' AND addresses.address_details = '6187 Feil Extension Apt. 749' AND customers.customer_email = 'tkassulke@example.com'
records.pred_sql: select addresses.address_id from addresses join customer_addresses on addresses.address_id = customer_addresses.address_id join customers on customer_addresses.customer_id = customers.customer_id where addresses.state_province_county like '%maine%' and addresses.address_details = '6187 Feil Extension Apt. 749' and customer_addresses.address_type = 'House' and customer_addresses.date_from = '2010-12-29 11:01:39' and customer_addresses.date_to = '2018-03-22 02:54:10' and lower(customers.customer_email) = 'tkassulke@example.com' and customers.date_became_customer >= '2012-01-11 21:17:01' limit 5;
records.thought: We need addresses in Maine with exact details, linked via Customer_Addresses as 'House' between the given dates, and belonging to customers with the specified email and date_became_customer. We'll join Addresses, Customer_Addresses, and Customers, applying all filters.

records.question: Which addresses in New Lizziechester, Massachusetts are associated with an employee named Anthony?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT addresses.address_id FROM addresses
JOIN employees ON addresses.address_id = employees.employee_address_id
WHERE addresses.state_province_county = 'Massachusetts' AND addresses.city = 'New Lizziechester' AND employees.employee_name = 'Anthony'
records.pred_sql: select addresses.address_id from addresses join employees on employees.employee_address_id = addresses.address_id where lower(addresses.city) = 'new lizziechester' and lower(addresses.state_province_county) = 'massachusetts' and lower(employees.employee_name) like '%anthony%' limit 5;
records.thought: We need addresses in New Lizziechester, Massachusetts that are linked to employees named Anthony. Join Addresses to Employees using employee_address_id, filter by city, state_province_county, and employee_name.

records.question: Where are the addresses located in Maine with the zip postcode exactly 674 that are linked to both customers and delivery route locations?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT addresses.address_id FROM addresses
JOIN customer_addresses ON addresses.address_id = customer_addresses.address_id
JOIN delivery_route_locations ON addresses.address_id = delivery_route_locations.location_address_id
WHERE addresses.zip_postcode = '674' AND addresses.state_province_county = 'Maine'
records.pred_sql: select addresses.address_id from addresses inner join customer_addresses on addresses.address_id = customer_addresses.address_id inner join delivery_route_locations on addresses.address_id = delivery_route_locations.location_address_id where lower(addresses.state_province_county) like '%maine%' and addresses.zip_postcode = '674' limit 5;
records.thought: We need addresses in Maine (state_province_county like '%maine%') with zip_postcode = '674', and that are linked to both customers (via Customer_Addresses) and delivery route locations (via Delivery_Route_Locations). We'll use inner joins and require both relationships.
